metadata.title: PID 127 hometour

fieldData.property-long-description: Sundrift is for those who gravitate toward warmth, natural light, and a home that instantly puts you at ease. Soft tones, a bright yellow sofa, and gentle afternoon sun give this space a grounded, comforting feel. The layout flows smoothly, making everyday routines feel unhurried — whether it’s slow breakfasts by the balcony or winding down as the light fades. With long lake views and greenery in sight, the home’s atmosphere is serene without feeling remote. Sundrift suits families who want a well-lit, welcoming space with personality, warmth, and room to grow.
fieldData.name: Sundrift, Haralur Road

metadata.title: PID 128 hometour

fieldData.property-long-description: Skylark rises above the tree line, opening to striking lake and skyline views that set the tone for the entire home. Inside, the deep burgundy sofa, clean lines, and modern finishes create a look that’s confident and contemporary. It’s made for people who want their home to feel intentional — a space that works beautifully for hosting, unwinding, and everyday living. Natural light pours in across the day, giving the interiors a crisp, elevated feel. Skylark is ideal for those who appreciate sharp design, openness, and the quiet luxury of living high above the bustle.
fieldData.name: Skylark, Haralur Road

fieldData.property-long-description: Perched high above the bustle of Old Madras Road, this 3BHK duplex penthouse offers a rare mix of warmth, privacy, and connectivity. The home opens into an airy living space finished in rich wood tones and cozy textures, leading to a breezy terrace that’s perfect for slow mornings or late-evening conversations. Thoughtfully furnished and spread across two levels, it balances character with comfort — every detail designed to make daily living effortless. Located just steps from Benniganahalli Metro Station, it gives you unmatched city access while still feeling tucked away. With amenities like a rooftop lounge, swimming pool, and fitness zone, the home is ideal for those who want convenience, calm, and a touch of individuality — all in one address.
fieldData.name: Upper Deck, Old Madras Road

metadata.html: <iframe class="embedly-embed" src="//cdn.embedly.com/widgets/media.html?src=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fembed%2FmKW1SneRw5M%3Ffeature%3Doembed&display_name=YouTube&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DmKW1SneRw5M&image=https%3A%2F%2Fi.ytimg.com%2Fvi%2FmKW1SneRw5M%2Fhqdefault.jpg&type=text%2Fhtml&schema=youtube" width="854" height="480" scrolling="no" title="YouTube embed" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; fullscreen; encrypted-media; picture-in-picture;" allowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
metadata.title: PID 122 hometour

fieldData.property-long-description: This 3BHK is where nature and design meet in quiet harmony. Set within one of Bangalore’s most sought-after communities, it opens to a private garden balcony with skyline views — a rare blend of city energy and calm greenery. Inside, warm wood tones, soft lighting, and expansive glass frames create a space that feels both grounded and alive. Every element is crafted for effortless comfort, from the living room that spills into the garden to the thoughtful flow between rooms. Surrounded by tree-lined pathways, open lawns, and world-class amenities, this home is part of a community built for people who appreciate detail, design, and serenity. Minutes from ITPL, Whitefield’s social circuit, and key schools, it’s a space that lets you live beautifully — without compromise.
fieldData.name: Radical Rhapsody, Whitefield

fieldData.property-long-description: This bright 2BHK in Mahadevpura is made for families who want both flexibility and ease. It’s well-lit, cross-ventilated, and has a simple, open layout that feels naturally welcoming. The space is unfurnished — so you can set it up exactly how you like — but comes with all the benefits of living with Flent: verified homes, smooth move-ins, and responsive support when you need it. It’s close to key schools, work hubs, and daily conveniences, making it ideal for anyone who wants a home that’s hassle-free yet entirely their own. A blank slate, ready for your touch.
fieldData.name: Canvas, Mahadevpura

fieldData.property-long-description: This 3BHK in Hebbal sits in one of North Bangalore’s most exciting pockets — right next to Phoenix Mall of Asia, the city’s newest and most hyped destination for food, fashion, and everything social. The home itself is calm and contemporary, with soft greys, warm wood tones, and a layout that feels open without being overwhelming. Large windows bring in greenery and light, giving the space a balanced, grounded vibe. What truly sets it apart is the community. With a resort-style pool, a well-equipped gym, and beautifully planned courtyards, this place has all the makings of the next “the” society in North Bangalore — the one everyone wants to be in. Add to that seamless access to the airport road, tech parks, schools, and healthcare, and you get a home that nails both lifestyle and convenience without trying too hard.
fieldData.name: Raintree, Hebbal

metadata.title: PID 121 hometour

fieldData.property-long-description: This 3BHK on the first floor is modern, warm, and thoughtfully designed for easy living. The living room blends wood tones with soft textures, opening onto a green-facing balcony that feels private and peaceful. There’s a quiet rhythm to the space — sunlight filters in through large windows, furniture is functional yet stylish, and every element feels intentional. The community offers top-tier amenities including a pool, gym, and lush open areas, creating a calm escape from city noise. Located close to Bellandur’s tech corridor and key social hubs, it balances work-life convenience with the comfort of a well-finished home.
fieldData.name: Reflection, Green Glen Layout

metadata.title: Reflection by Flent
metadata.description: This 3BHK on the first floor is modern, warm, and thoughtfully designed for easy living. The living room blends wood tones with soft textures, opening onto a green-facing balcony that feels private and peaceful. There's a quiet rhythm to the space - sunlight filters in through large windows, furniture is functional yet stylish, and every element feels intentional.

fieldData.property-long-description: This 3BHK in Koramangala is a calm, spacious retreat with a distinctly modern edge. The soft blue tones, open layout, and warm lighting make it both refreshing and comfortable — equally suited for work, relaxation, or hosting friends. The living area flows into a bright workspace setup, while the furniture and finishes add a sense of balance and polish. Every detail feels intentional, from the wooden textures to the airy balcony views. Located close to the city’s best cafés, offices, and parks, this home gives you space to unwind without stepping away from the energy of the neighborhood. A perfect mix of ease and elegance, designed for those who like their homes to feel as put-together as they do.
fieldData.name: Aksha, Koramangala

fieldData.property-long-description: This 2BHK on the 3rd floor blends easy warmth with fresh, modern comfort. The soft sage-green accents and natural textures bring a calming energy, while the open dining and kitchen space feels bright and lived-in. It's the kind of home that makes everyday routines feel unhurried, whether it's a slow breakfast by the window or evenings spent winding down in the cozy living area. The layout is practical, with plenty of light and thoughtful design touches throughout. Set in a well-connected pocket of Bellandur, it is close to Outer Ring Road, tech parks, cafes, and essentials; ideal for those who want convenience without giving up calm.
fieldData.name: Sage, Bellandur

fieldData.property-long-description: A cheerful 2BHK in Mahadevpura that feels both fresh and functional. The living room brings in an easy warmth with its soft green accents, natural light, and cozy setup that makes unwinding effortless. The interiors are thoughtfully done — simple, bright, and welcoming — perfect for anyone looking for a space that feels like home from day one. Located close to IT hubs like Bagmane Constellation and Google Ananta, and surrounded by cafés, gyms, and stores, it keeps everything within reach. Whether you’re working nearby or just want a calm, well-connected home, this one blends everyday convenience with quiet charm.
fieldData.name: Mint, Mahadevpura

fieldData.property-long-description: Spacious, bright, and quietly elegant — this 3BHK brings a sense of calm right in the middle of the city. The large living area opens into a dining space framed by arched windows and leafy views, filling the home with light through the day. Soft tones, marble floors, and warm wooden accents make the space feel timeless and grounded. You’re minutes away from MG Road, Cunningham Road, and Vasanth Nagar — with cafés, hospitals, and parks all close by. It’s the kind of home that feels tucked away yet connected to everything that matters.
fieldData.name: Ivory House, Millers Road

fieldData.property-long-description: This 3BHK in Koramangala delivers the comfort of a well-designed home with the convenience of being in one of Bangalore’s most connected neighbourhoods. The living space feels warm and welcoming, with soft lighting, elegant wooden accents, and a dining area that’s perfect for everyday meals or casual hosting. Each corner has character without feeling cluttered—simple, tasteful, and easy to live in. Step outside and everything is within reach: cafés, restaurants, supermarkets, gyms, schools, co-working spaces, and parks. Getting around is effortless with quick access to major roads and both IT corridors. Whether you work nearby or just enjoy being close to the city’s best lifestyle options, this location makes daily life smoother. It’s the kind of home that’s practical, stylish, and perfectly placed.
fieldData.name: Habitat, Koramangala

fieldData.property-long-description: Perched on the 5th floor, this luminous 3BHK blends timeless elegance with a touch of modern flair. The living room is an inviting space of balance — a pop of turquoise against warm neutrals, brought to life by natural light streaming through tall French windows. Thoughtful design details like soft wall lighting, artful textures, and sleek furniture give the home a polished, welcoming feel. Perfectly planned for both quiet evenings and effortless entertaining, every element flows together to create a sense of calm sophistication. Ideal for those who value comfort without compromise, this home offers a tranquil retreat high above the bustle — where mornings begin in sunshine and evenings unwind in style.
fieldData.name: Vento, Haralur Road

fieldData.property-long-description: Perched on the 5th floor, this bright and breezy 1BHK is a hidden gem in Mahadevpura — just a short stroll from Google Ananta and Bagmane Constellation Business Park. Thoughtfully designed for modern professionals, it blends cozy interiors with a stunning open terrace that feels like your private sky lounge. Whether it’s morning coffee with panoramic city views or unwinding under the stars after a long day, the terrace becomes your personal escape. Inside, clean lines, soft lighting, and a smart layout create a calm, functional living space that feels larger than life. Perfect for those who value both convenience and quiet, this home offers a seamless mix of urban energy and tranquil comfort — your ideal city hideaway, minutes from where the action happens.
fieldData.name: Skyline, Mahadevpura

fieldData.property-long-description: Step into a home that radiates calm sophistication, where modern minimalism meets warm, earthy tones. This thoughtfully designed 3BHK invites you to slow down and enjoy everyday living, with a living room that balances comfort and elegance through clean lines, natural light, and tasteful accents. The soft beige and clay-inspired palette creates a grounding ambiance, complemented by sleek furniture and subtle décor touches that make every corner feel intentional. Whether it’s unwinding with loved ones in the cozy lounge, hosting dinners with ease, or finding quiet moments by the warm glow of wall sconces, this home seamlessly blends functionality with charm. Perfect for those who value both style and serenity, it’s more than just a residence—it’s a space that feels alive, welcoming, and deeply personal.
fieldData.name: Terracotta, Bellandur

fieldData.property-long-description: Step into a home where comfort meets aspiration in the heart of Indiranagar, Bangalore. This thoughtfully designed 2BHK is more than just a space – it’s a canvas for the life you’ve always imagined. Picture slow mornings bathed in sunlight streaming through large windows, evenings filled with laughter around the dining table, and cozy nights unwinding in a warm, inviting living room. The seamless flow of the space makes every corner feel connected yet intimate, perfect for creating memories that last. Surrounded by Indiranagar’s vibrant energy, you’re never far from your favorite cafés, hidden gems, and lively streets, yet inside, there’s a sense of calm that feels like your own private world. Whether it’s a place to dream big, grow together, or simply pause and breathe, this home offers not just four walls, but a lifestyle filled with possibility and joy.
fieldData.name: Archa, Indiranagar

metadata.title: Cedar in Indiranagar by Flent
metadata.description: Experience a slice of Himachal right in the heart of Bangalore with this stunning 1BHK in Indiranagar. Crafted almost entirely with rich, warm wood, this home exudes a cozy, cabin-like vibe that instantly transports you to a mountain getaway. The interiors are thoughtfully designed with bespoke touches, from statement art pieces to stylish yet functional furniture.

fieldData.property-long-description: Experience a slice of Himachal right in the heart of Bangalore with this stunning 1BHK in Indiranagar. Crafted almost entirely with rich, warm wood, this home exudes a cozy, cabin-like vibe that instantly transports you to a mountain getaway. The interiors are thoughtfully designed with bespoke touches, from statement art pieces to stylish yet functional furniture. Natural light floods the space through large windows, creating a bright and inviting atmosphere. The open-plan layout seamlessly connects the living and dining areas, while the spacious terrace is perfect for morning coffees, evening unwinds, or hosting friends under the city sky. Nestled in vibrant Indiranagar, you’re just minutes away from the city’s best cafes, bars, and boutiques—yet this home feels like a peaceful retreat. Perfect for those who crave a unique living experience that blends urban convenience with tranquil, nature-inspired design.
fieldData.name: Cedar, Indiranagar

fieldData.property-long-description:
This ground-floor 3BHK in Total Environment’s luxury residences feels like an oasis, blurring the line between home and retreat. A private garden extends from the living area to the bedrooms, wrapping the space in greenery. Step outside and you’re surrounded by vines hanging from terraces, tall trees, and neatly pruned bushes framing the windows.
Inside, thoughtful design details create a natural sense of calm – warm lighting, wood finishes, and cool Kota stone floors. Even everyday routines feel special here, with touches like a skylight in the shower that brings natural light into the space.
Beyond your home, the community offers a swimming pool, a fully equipped gym, dedicated in-house maintenance, and reliable security. Strategically located just minutes from Outer Ring Road and Bellandur, you remain connected to the city while still coming home to calm.
fieldData.name: Raindrops, Haralur Road

fieldData.property-long-description: Live in the top 1% of city homes with this ultra-luxury 1BHK in South Bangalore. Featuring a private jacuzzi, massive balconies, premium wooden flooring, and bespoke finishes, this apartment is designed for indulgence. Located in Koramangala’s most prime spot, you’re steps away from the best clubs, restaurants, and city life — yet always return to a serene, resort-style retreat. This isn’t just a home. It’s your statement of luxury.
fieldData.name: Aurum, Koramangala

metadata.title: Ivory by Flent
metadata.description: Step into this elegantly furnished 3BHK home in Hebbal, designed to offer a seamless blend of comfort and style. With a warm, well-lit living and dining area, tasteful décor, and large windows that invite in natural light, the space feels both spacious and inviting.

fieldData.property-long-description: Step into this elegantly furnished 3BHK home in Hebbal, designed to offer a seamless blend of comfort and style. With a warm, well-lit living and dining area, tasteful décor, and large windows that invite in natural light, the space feels both spacious and inviting. Each bedroom is thoughtfully set up with queen/king beds, ample storage, and soft furnishings to ensure restful living. The home comes fully equipped with a modular kitchen, smart TV, inverter, high-speed Wi-Fi, and all essential appliances — making it completely move-in ready. Located in a premium gated community with access to top-tier amenities like a swimming pool, gym, clubhouse, and 24x7 security, this home is ideal for families or working professionals looking for a peaceful, plug-and-play lifestyle in North Bangalore.
fieldData.name: Sandstone, Hebbal
